name: Write events
description: Ingest events into a data product via the Loxtep SDK. Uses LoxtepClient.data_products.get_writer(data_product_name) which resolves queue, bot, and bus config automatically.

data_product_name.description: Name or UUID of the target data product. The SDK resolves the output queue, bot ID, and bus config automatically from this.

events.description: Array of event payloads to write.
